column19: Conducted Power - Measured at the end of coax (dBm)

column20: Set up MVG WaveStudio for conducted power measurement. Have cable loss set to "0".
Clone existing WaveStudio project that has frequencies in order for graph.
Use RF cable as shown in picture. The cable should stay with fixture.
The same RF cable will be connected to dipoles.
Put phone in a shielded box to help with registering to callbox.
Clone a WaveStudio project file that has frequencies in order to graph results.
Use the same RF cable as used in the conducted measurement to connect to dipoles.
